primary_accounting_issue: Eligibility of intragroup dividend receivables for foreign exchange risk hedge accounting designation in consolidated financial statements

primary_authority.reason: Defines the scope and requirements for designating foreign currency risk hedged items in net investment hedges and establishes that hedge accounting may only apply once in consolidated statements
Governs eligible hedged items and hedging instruments for hedge accounting, including requirements for designation and documentation

supporting_authority.reason: Provides the exception for foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items to qualify as hedged items in consolidated financial statements and governs exchange difference recognition
Clarifies that only transactions with external parties qualify as hedged items but creates exception for foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items from foreign operations

peripheral_authority.reason: Disclosures about restrictions and structured entities are not relevant to hedge accounting eligibility determination
Addresses non-cash dividend distribution measurement but does not govern foreign exchange hedge accounting designation
Credit risk and liquidity disclosures are not relevant to hedge accounting designation for foreign exchange risk

treatment_families.family: General foreign currency risk hedge accounting
Net investment hedge accounting for foreign currency risk

approaches.label: Foreign currency hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: General hedge accounting model applies to designation of foreign exchange risk on monetary items including intragroup dividend receivables, subject to IFRIC 16 paragraph 10 and IFRS 9 eligibility requirements for external party transactions

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: Alternative model under which foreign currency risk of intragroup monetary items from foreign operations may qualify as hedged item in consolidated statements per IAS 21 paragraph 32 exception, as clarified by IFRIC 16 paragraph 6.3.6
